message:
fix(gateway): resolve TypeScript strictness errors for exactOptionalPropertyTypes

Fix multiple TypeScript errors related to exactOptionalPropertyTypes in
gateway services and routes:

- routes/beads.ts, routes/mail.ts: Import ContentfulStatusCode and cast
  httpStatus for Hono's c.json() calls
- routes/metrics.ts: Add missing NamedSnapshot import
- routes/utilities.ts: Fix duplicate 'success' property and conditional
  object building for GiilRequest/CsctfRequest
- services/agent-events.ts: Build payloads conditionally to avoid
  undefined optional properties
- services/agent.ts: Build getOutputFromBuffer options conditionally
- services/agentmail.ts: Build service config conditionally
- services/alerts.ts: Fix fireAlert, acknowledgeAlert, dismissAlert to
  conditionally set optional properties
- services/auto-checkpoint.service.ts: Build result conditionally
- __tests__/history.service.test.ts: Fix chainable mock type definition

All 642 tests pass.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.5 <noreply@anthropic.com>
